name: high_electrification
_comment: High Electrification Scenario - Accelerated fuel switching and efficiency improvements

_parameters.name: Scenario identifier used in outputs and comparisons
_parameters.forecast_horizon: Number of years to project forward (10 years = 2025-2035)
_parameters.housing_growth_rate: Annual housing unit growth rate (1% per year, same as baseline)
_parameters.electrification_rate: Annual rate of gas-to-electric fuel switching (5% per year, 2.5x baseline)
_parameters.efficiency_improvement: Annual equipment efficiency improvement rate (2% per year, 2x baseline)
_parameters.weather_assumption: Weather scenario: 'normal' uses 30-year normals, 'warm' reduces HDD, 'cold' increases HDD
_parameters.end_use_scope: List of end-uses to simulate. Current scope: ['space_heating']
_parameters.max_premises: Maximum premises to simulate (0 = all). Set to 1000-5000 for quick testing
_parameters.vectorized: Use fast vectorized simulation (true) or row-by-row loop (false)

_notes: This scenario demonstrates accelerated electrification and efficiency improvements.
Electrification rate of 5% reflects aggressive policy support (e.g., heat pump incentives, gas bans).
Efficiency improvements of 2% reflect faster equipment turnover and adoption of high-efficiency models.
Housing growth remains at 1% (same as baseline) to isolate the impact of fuel switching and efficiency.
